channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Bitcoin sits at a pivotal squeeze: break $78,080 in 72 hours and the path to $82K opens; fail and $70K looms. Short squeezes could fuel the move.... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260418-bitcoins-82k-breakout-window-closes-in-72-hours-prediction #Bitcoin #Crypto #Trading

item.title: 🔥 Grok Speech slashes the field: zero-guess accuracy, razor pricing, real-time edge. Is this the end for incumbents? https://Blockchain.News/news/xai-launches-grok-speech-apis-undercutting-competitors #AI #Speech #Grok
item.description: 🔥 Grok Speech slashes the field: zero-guess accuracy, razor pricing, real-time edge. Is this the end for incumbents? https://Blockchain.News/news/xai-launches-grok-speech-apis-undercutting-competitors #AI #Speech #Grok

item.title: NVIDIA revs Dynamo: up to 97% KV cache hits, 4x latency wins for AI coding agents. Big enterprise speed, smaller compute—could reshape open-source vs managed inference. ⚡️💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/nvidia-dynamo-agentic-ai-inference-optimization #AI #GPU #Cloud
item.description: NVIDIA revs Dynamo: up to 97% KV cache hits, 4x latency wins for AI coding agents. Big enterprise speed, smaller compute—could reshape open-source vs managed inference. ⚡️💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/nvidia-dynamo-agentic-ai-inference-optimization #AI #GPU #Cloud
